body.objective: Deliver a G-03 validation verdict for venture V-2027-004 with the pre-registered kill criteria evaluated.
constraints: No outbound contact with real customers under the venture's own brand
Use only C0-C1 data; no personal data (C3+) without a PRIVACY hold clearance
acceptance_criteria: A validation DR exists citing landing-test conversion vs the 2.0% threshold
At least 12 customer interviews are logged with a structured pain summary
